positive: A group of whimsical woodland animals (fox, badger, squirrel) having a tea party in a cozy forest setting. The style should be charming, storybook illustration, inspired by Beatrix Potter meets modern digital art. Soft pastels, clean lines, inviting atmosphere, highly rendered, perfect for children's merchandise.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, dark colors, scary, realistic wildlife photography
